findings.detail: Visual inspection of the rendered PNG confirms: two subgraphs sit side-by-side (VAGUE left, Algorithm right) in LR layout with direction TB within each panel. Left panel uses pink/red fill (vague + dead classDef) clearly signalling broken/incomplete steps. Right panel uses standard palette: purple for the decision diamond (auto classDef), blue for Write Pass/Write Fail action nodes (act classDef), green for Stop terminal (done classDef). Color contrast between left (red) and right (purple/blue/green) makes the contrast immediately readable. Subtitle 'no rule given' on the ??? node is legible at 12px in red. Yes/No edge labels are clear of node bounding boxes. No overlaps, no truncation, no illegible crossings. Governing concept is in the --- title: field. All bold labels are plain English, 4 words or fewer, tracing directly to corpus §5.6 worked contrast.

source_preflight.mermaid_parse: pass — valid flowchart LR syntax with two direction TB subgraphs linked via ~~~; config block with theme/themeVariables/flowchart keys correctly structured; htmlLabels: true; class assignments at bottom using class keyword syntax
source_preflight.node_count: pass — 7 nodes (v1, v2, v3, a1, a2, a3, a4), within 3-8 limit
source_preflight.label_discipline: pass — all bold labels: 'Look at score' (3 words), 'Decide if passed?' (3 words), '???' (symbol), 'Score 50 or above?' (4 words), 'Write Pass' (2 words), 'Write Fail' (2 words), 'Stop' (1 word) — all within 4-word limit
source_preflight.concept_fidelity: pass — all labels trace directly to corpus §5.6 worked contrast: Version A step 1 (Look at score), Version A step 2 vague decision (Decide if passed?), Version A dead-end no rule (???), Version B condition (Score 50 or above?), Version B pass branch (Write Pass), Version B fail branch (Write Fail), Version B terminator (Stop)
source_preflight.label_plainness: pass — no unexplained acronyms; all terms are plain everyday English; '???' is an intentional symbol representing ambiguity
source_preflight.title_discipline: pass — governing concept 'What makes steps an algorithm?' in --- config title: field; no dangling ghost annotation nodes
source_preflight.single_path_discipline: pass — side-by-side panel layout for contrast intent is correct; LR root with direction TB subgraphs is the appropriate pattern; branching in ALGO subgraph (Yes/No from decision diamond) is intentional and correct

visual_inspection.method: Claude vision via Read tool on rendered PNG
visual_inspection.nodes_overlap: pass — no overlapping bounding boxes; both subgraphs are clearly separated with ample horizontal spacing; nodes within each panel have clean vertical separation
visual_inspection.label_truncated: pass — all node labels fully visible; no ellipsis, clipping, or awkward wrapping detected
visual_inspection.crossings_illegible: pass — no cross-panel edges; within VAGUE panel, vertical TB flow is clean; within ALGO panel, the Yes/No edges from decision diamond to Write Pass/Write Fail and then to Stop are clean with no edge-on-edge overlap
visual_inspection.layout_wrong_for_intent: pass — LR with TB subgraphs correctly renders as side-by-side contrast; left panel = vague, right panel = algorithmic; reads left-to-right as intended
visual_inspection.missing_side_panel_pattern: pass — two subgraphs clearly visible side by side with distinct titled borders
visual_inspection.side_panels_hollow: pass — neither panel has large empty interior; VAGUE panel 3 nodes fill it proportionally; ALGO panel 4 nodes (including branch) fill it naturally
visual_inspection.whitespace_imbalance: pass — right panel (ALGO) is slightly taller than left panel (VAGUE) due to the additional branching structure (4 nodes vs 3), but the difference is content-driven and within acceptable bounds; canvas is not more than 40% empty
visual_inspection.subtitle_illegible: pass — 'no rule given' subtitle on ??? node is rendered in red at 12px and is readable at viewer scale
visual_inspection.color_tier_violation: pass — left panel: pink/red (vague + dead classDef) correctly signals broken/incomplete; right panel: purple (auto) for decision diamond, blue (act) for action nodes, green (done) for Stop terminal; contrast between panels reads correctly with no palette confusion
visual_inspection.edge_label_collision: pass — 'Yes' and 'No' labels on exit edges from ALGO decision diamond are visible and clear of all node bounding boxes

stats.layout: flowchart LR (two direction TB subgraphs side by side)
stats.png_render_status: confirmed — PNG visually inspected via Claude vision Read tool
